overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic city. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, holographic corporate advertisements, and warm afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway walkway with corporate advertising

events.description: character transitions from running to walking pace
pedestrian in white temporarily blocks view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: moving along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead casting shadows on the walkway
glowing digital advertisement displaying red sports car with corporate luxury text
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings forming the city skyline
yellow safety railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. The walkway is lined with a yellow metal railing on the left and features large holographic billboards advertising corporate luxury vehicles. The character moves from a brief run into a steady walk, following a pedestrian dressed in white ahead of them.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway walkway transitioning past concrete barriers

events.description: view shifts to reveal more of the glass skyscraper skyline as the character passes the initial billboard

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway with the camera panning slightly to capture the urban environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing continues walking ahead on the right side of the path

entered.detail: solid concrete wall running parallel to the walkway on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sheltered pathway as the camera pans to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape. The holographic billboard moves out of view behind the character, while a concrete barrier becomes prominent on the left. The elevated highway structure looms closer overhead as the character approaches the pedestrian ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement beneath a massive elevated highway, transitioning from a view of vibrant corporate advertisements to a more enclosed urban corridor. It begins with the character moving from a brief run into a steady walk along a walkway lined with a yellow metal railing and large holographic billboards for luxury vehicles. As the character follows a pedestrian dressed in white, the camera pans to reveal the surrounding futuristic cityscape while the holographic displays gradually slide out of view. The scene then shifts focus toward a prominent concrete barrier on the left as the character closes the gap with the pedestrian. Finally, the oppressive scale of the highway structure looms closer overhead, framing the character within the sheltered concrete pathway.
